summary: Leads frontline teams, reinforces CI‑OS behaviors, ensures operational stability, and coaches team members in continuous improvement methods.
responsibilities: Oversee daily operations and ensure adherence to standard work and CI‑OS practices
Coach frontline operators in CI‑OS tools, problem‑solving, and improvement behaviors
Monitor team performance metrics and lead daily huddles or tiered meetings
Identify abnormalities, bottlenecks, and improvement opportunities during gemba walks
Escalate deviations, safety concerns, and quality issues according to CI‑OS protocols
Support PDCA cycles, kaizen events, and frontline experiments
Ensure training completion and competency development for team members
Collaborate with Process Engineers to validate and implement process changes
Maintain team schedules, workload balance, and resource availability
Provide feedback to Workflow Orchestrator, Quality Manager, and Training Manager
authorities: Stop work for safety or quality concerns
Approve minor process adjustments within defined boundaries
Assign tasks and manage team workload
Escalate systemic issues to higher‑level roles
kaizenCapabilities: Identification of waste in daily operations
cqiCapabilities: Integration of team metrics into CQI dashboards
Execution and reinforcement of updated standard work

constraints: All decisions must align with safety and quality standards
Escalations must follow CI‑OS governance pathways
Coaching and training updates must be documented
